name: incubate
description: Bud + wake + fire /incubate <source> — yeast-budding plus wrapping a source repo in a dedicated oracle.
author: Soul-Brews-Studio

cli.help:
maw incubate <source-repo> [--stem <name>] [--from <oracle>] [--root] [--seed] [--org <org>] [--note <text>] [--nickname <pretty>] [--fast] [--split] [--dry-run] [--flash | --contribute] [--no-trigger] [--trigger <text>]
       Mirrors `maw bud` flags + 4 incubate-specific.
       Creates a NEW dedicated <stem>-oracle wrapping <source-repo>, then fires /incubate <source> in the new oracle's TUI.
       Use --stem to override the auto-derived stem (default: source basename).
       Mode flags pass through to the /incubate skill (--flash, --contribute).
       Use --no-trigger for bud + wake without firing /incubate (debug).
